_meta.purpose: doc32 Phase3 bk/lm L1 源 + 解码字典(DB实测只读)

7727000357.bkfilingregion: Northern District of Illinois, Eastern Division

7727003923.bkfilingregion: Main District Of South Carolina, Charleston Division

7727003984.bkfilingregion: Central District Of California, Riverside Division

newrez.portnewrezbk.asof_basis: dataasof (snapshot date); filing recency via bkfileddate
newrez.portnewrezbk.note: Latest BK record per loan picked by ORDER BY bkfileddate DESC, bkrcurrentstatusdate DESC, dataasof DESC, id DESC. Many loans have a placeholder BK row with all BK detail cols NULL (only prepetitionduedate populated) = no real bankruptcy on file. bkstatus/bkstage/bkchapter/bkremovalcode/mfrhearingresults/cramdownhearingresults/adversarialresults/bankruptcypaymenttype/debtorintention/bkborrowerintent/bksourceoffundscode are INT codes with NO decode in newrez.newrezdatadic.

newrez.portnewrezlm.asof_basis: dataasof (snapshot date); cycle recency via dealstartdate
newrez.portnewrezlm.note: Latest LM cycle per loan picked by ORDER BY dealstartdate DESC, statusstartdate DESC, dataasof DESC, id DESC. lmdeal/lmstatus/lmprogram/lmdecision/denialreason/hardshiptype/forbearancestatus/forbearancetype/trialstatus/repaymenttype/repaymentstatus are INT codes with NO decode in newrez.newrezdatadic.

newrez.portnewrezdatadic.resolved_table: newrez.newrezdatadic (the literal name portnewrezdatadic does NOT exist; only newrezdatadic does)
newrez.portnewrezdatadic.grain: wide table: 1 column-pair (<field>/<field>_description) per category, 61 rows
newrez.portnewrezdatadic.note: newrez.newrezdatadic is the ONLY dictionary table in the newrez schema and decodes ONLY these 6 general loan attributes. It contains NO LMStatus/LMDeal/LMProgram/LMDecision/BKStatus/BKChapter/BKStage/forbearance/etc. decode mappings. The INT codes in portnewrezbk and portnewrezlm have no lookup source in this DB.
